description_long: This bird features a compact body with a vibrant blue upper plumage and a rich chestnut-brown underside. Its head is adorned with a speckled blue crown, and the eyes are set above a long, straight, and pointed beak that is pale in color. The wings and back display a deep blue hue, while the flanks and belly transition to a warm brown. The legs are short and pale, almost blending with the underbelly. The tail is short and appears slightly squared at the tip, with blue coloration matching the wings and back.
description: A small bird with a blue back and wings, chestnut-brown underside, and a long, pointed pale beak. The head is speckled blue, and the tail is short and squared.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated, pointed beak, blue upperparts, and brown underparts.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the blue back, short squared tail, and both legs visible beneath the body.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar features to view 0, showing the beak, blue back, and brown underside.
description_view_3: Front view emphasizing the pointed beak, speckled blue crown, and symmetrical body shape.
attribute_plumage_pattern: blue upperparts with speckled crown, solid chestnut-brown underparts, and subtle pale markings
